details.test: Task 1: Register earliest CO lead safety workshop under $80
Task 2: Purchase 1-year Professional Routesetter membership under $120 (auto-renew off)
Task 3: Bookmark 3 advanced anchor-building articles after 2023-01-01
Task 4: Add 2 Denver-area youth-program gyms within 20 miles to favorites
Task 5: Apply to head routesetter job in Pacific region with salary >= 55k using saved profile
Task 6: Register youth climber for cheapest available event (competition-like flow)
Task 7: Enroll in intermediate coaching course (4.5+ rating, <=8 weeks) and add to learning plan
Task 8: Volunteer for online evening Safety Standards committee with >=2 interest areas
